subcodes.first_line: O peerless and unique one! Your letter of 5 Muharram 1329 arrived, and although a few days ago a detailed letter was written to you [3.5s]... ...As to the Huquq, it is payable on whatever is left over after deducting one's yearly expenses. However, any money or possession which is necessary in producing income for one's subsistence
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای وحید فرید نامه ۵ محرم ۱۳۲۹ رسید هر چند چند روز پیش نامه مفصلی بشما مرقوم
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @predictions and prophecies, @interpretation of words and passages in scripture, @law of Huququ'llah
